examSet.title: AMT Practice Exam 2026
examSet.description: Official practice exam for AMT candidates

questions.prompt: Which of the following describes a first-class lever?
questions.explanation: In a first-class lever, the fulcrum is located between the effort force and the load.

options.text: The fulcrum is between the effort and the load
The load is between the fulcrum and the effort
The effort is between the fulcrum and the load

questions.prompt: According to Bernoulli's principle, what happens to the pressure of a fluid when its speed increases?
questions.explanation: Bernoulli's principle states that an increase in the speed of a fluid occurs simultaneously with a decrease in static pressure.
